item.title: Democrats weigh Trump school vouchers, with billions at stake
item.description: Democratic governors, under pressure, must decide whether to participate in the new federal voucher program, which offers dollars for public and priva...

item.title: Full economic turnaround will take time, Vance says in interview
item.description: Vice President JD Vance argues voters should have patience with the pace of economic improvements, saying there was “no way” to fix the economy overni...

item.title: Senate to vote on forcing Trump to end Iran strikes
item.description: Congress has voted on seven other war powers resolutions since June, all of which failed.

item.title: Cornyn, Paxton reach runoff; other takeaways from big election night
item.description: New congressional maps debuted in Texas and North Carolina, as Republicans defend their majorities and Democrats look to flip both chambers.

item.title: Talarico wins Democratic primary for U.S. Senate in Texas
